transcript: Speaker A: Hello. Speaker B: Hello. Speaker A: अ... आता काय बोलायचं? [Uh... what to say now?] Speaker B: मलाही तेच वाटतंय. [I feel the same.] Speaker A: How are you, Neha? Speaker B: Um, I am... मी छान आहे. [I am... I am fine.] Speaker A: तसं नाही, असं बोल, "I am good". [Not like that, say it like this, "I am good".] Speaker B: I am good. Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटीपेक्षा जास्त लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: MySivi, Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access
summary: A woman practices English conversation with an AI partner on the MySivi app, who corrects her grammar. The ad showcases the app's popularity and promotes a trial offer for just ₹1.
